title: Bois Pack 8
description: The 8th Bois Pack reflecting a return to origins in a Vanilla+ Pack
body:
Bois Pack 8 represents the culmination of years of making modpacks and Minecraft servers for ourselves and others. Rather than go all-out with a kitchen sink style modpack, we decided to finish off with a Vanilla+ modpack, combining our history of modpacks with our love of the base game.

This modpack features mostly performance improvements for clients and servers, but also some mods meant to facilitate a multiplayer server experience. It can be used in a singleplayer or multiplayer environment. For those who are familiar with our previous modpacks, thank you for the support through the years, and we hope you've enjoyed.

*INCLUDES:*
- Performance mods like __Sodium, Lithium,__ and __FerriteCore__
- Aesthetic mods like __Not Enough Animations__ and __Iris__
- Multiplayer mods like __Simple Voice Chat__
- Quality of Life mods like __Debugify, Freecam,__ and __MouseTweaks__
- Some content mods like __Tom's Simple Storage__, meant to decrease the time spent organizing chests

Everything you need for a multiplayer build server experience without compromising or greatly altering the Vanilla experience.

*NOTE*: This is the "final" Bois Pack due to time constraints on the part of the developers to create future custom modpacks. For those who have followed us along all these years, thank you! Your support and enjoyment are why we make these packs in the first place.
